h1: The indie studio where creative writing meets applied game design.
intro: We use game theory and gamification to solve real-world problems by  creating games. We can assist you and enhance your projects using game  design techniques and tools!
team-intro: Novak Studios is a collaboration between five game developers who met in their study. Quickly forming a bond through their love for video games  and storytelling, they aim to share their passion with the rest of the  world.
tagline: We use game theory and gamification to solve real-world problems by  creating games. We can assist you and enhance your projects using game  design techniques and tools!
